name: goblintown
description: Multi-agent orchestration protocol on top of OpenAI.
author: 0XBL33P

scripts.release:check: npm run clean && npm run test && npm run pack:check
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/drift.test.js dist/__tests__/reward.test.js dist/__tests__/hoard.test.js dist/__tests__/federation.test.js dist/__tests__/audit.test.js dist/__tests__/reward-plugin.test.js dist/__tests__/graph.test.js dist/__tests__/ban-list.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/budget.test.js dist/__tests__/run-store.test.js dist/__tests__/export-compare.test.js dist/__tests__/pack-prompt.test.js dist/__tests__/banners.test.js dist/__tests__/openai-client.test.js dist/__tests__/providers.test.js dist/__tests__/provider-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/tank-sprites.test.js dist/__tests__/formatting.test.js dist/__tests__/artifact.test.js dist/__tests__/specialist.test.js dist/__tests__/trace-export.test.js dist/__tests__/planner.test.js dist/__tests__/debate.test.js dist/__tests__/tools.test.js dist/__tests__/embeddings.test.js dist/__tests__/fold.test.js dist/__tests__/country.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
